title: Prometheus の 403 エラー：原因と解決策
reasons: Most technical claims are accurate and well-supported by official Prometheus documentation and reliable technical resources.
The article provides relevant code examples and troubleshooting steps for common Prometheus 403 error scenarios.

The claim that Prometheus 403 errors are exclusively not due to insufficient authentication or permissions is overly broad and contradicted by various sources, which show authentication/authorization issues (e.g., via reverse proxies, Kubernetes RBAC, or managed services) can lead to 403s.

sources.title: Management API - Prometheus
sources.claim: Prometheus provides a set of management APIs to facilitate automation and integration.

sources.title: Management API - Prometheus
sources.claim: The management API includes functionality such as deleting time series.

sources.title: Management API - Prometheus
sources.claim: The `/api/v1/admin/tsdb/delete_series` endpoint is used for time series data deletion.

sources.title: Port 9090 – Prometheus (Prometheus Monitoring) - PentestPad
sources.claim: Prometheus uses port 9090 as its default port for the web interface and API endpoints.

sources.title: How to delete specific time series metrics from Prometheus - ImageMaster
sources.claim: To enable time series deletion via the administrative HTTP API, the `--web.enable-admin-api` flag must be passed to Prometheus.

sources.title: Security model - Prometheus
sources.claim: The `--web.enable-admin-api` flag controls access to the administrative HTTP API, which includes functionality such as deleting time series, and is disabled by default.

sources.title: Security model - Prometheus
sources.claim: Without the `--web.enable-admin-api` flag, administrative endpoints typically respond with a 403 Forbidden error.

sources.title: How To Fix "server returned HTTP status 403 Forbidden" in Prometheus - Henry Xie 's blog
sources.claim: A 403 Forbidden error indicates explicit denial of access to API endpoints.

sources.title: Prometheus Web API is not enabled - Stack Overflow
sources.claim: When running Prometheus with Docker, the `--web.enable-admin-api` flag must be passed as a command-line argument to the container.

unsupported_claims: 認証情報の不足や権限不足ではなく、エンドポイント自体が無効化されているか、ネットワークレベルで遮断されている状態です。(It's not due to insufficient authentication or permissions, but rather the endpoint itself being disabled or blocked at the network level.)
improvement_suggestions: Optional improvement: add official or primary source URLs for unsupported or weakly sourced claims.

Optional improvement: Revise the statement regarding the causes of 403 errors to acknowledge that insufficient authentication or permissions, especially when external authentication mechanisms or reverse proxies are involved, can also result in a 403 Forbidden response.
Optional improvement: Ensure all factual claims in the article are followed by appropriate citations.
Optional improvement: Review current official docs and update changed API/spec/pricing details.
Optional improvement: Add official or primary source URLs for unsupported claims.
